mapper.sql: id, post_id, block_index, block_type, text_content, language, media_asset_id, caption, display_name, metadata_json, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into post_content_block( id, post_id, block_index, block_type, text_content, language, media_asset_id, caption, display_name, metadata_json, create_time, update_time ) values( #{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{blockIndex}, #{blockType}, #{textContent}, #{language}, #{mediaAssetId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{caption}, #{displayName}, #{metadataJson}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from post_content_block where post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY}
mapper.select: select from post_content_block where post_id = #{postId, jdbcType=BINARY} order by block_index asc
